title: Seamless Shaders
description: Allows you to switch between Iris shaders using arrow keys, quick and easy
body:
![Note This banner](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://res.cloudinary.com/dtrgnyly6/image/upload/v1765904661/minecraft_title_yxk3cn.png&w=300&h=300)

Seamless Shaders adds a quick way to switch Iris shaders in game without needing to open the shader screen. Simply press < to go backwards in your shader list and > to go forward. The mod tells you what shaders you are currently using when you switch, and has customisable keybinds so you're not restricted to the arrow keys. # Dependencies: - Fabric API: https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api - Sodium: https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium - Iris: https://modrinth.com/mod/iris ## Want more client side fun? Check out my other mods: - Let There Be Dark: https://modrinth.com/mod/ltbd - Note This!: https://modrinth.com/mod/note-this - AI Chat: https://modrinth.com/mod/chatai - Whiteboard: https://modrinth.com/mod/whiteboard - Bedrock Elytra: https://modrinth.com/mod/bedrock-elytra - Pinned Trades: https://modrinth.com/mod/pinned-trades
